questions.question: Select the most appropriate ANTONYM of the underlined word The new employee's behavior was quite amicable when he met his colleagues for the first time.
questions.explanation: A.Hostile(adjective) – antagonistic, aggressive, belligerent, unfriendly, inhospitable शत्रुतापूर्ण

questions.question: Select the word which means the same as the group of words given. Something causing shock or dismay
questions.explanation: B) Appalling(adjective) – Causing shock or dismay; horrifying.भयानक

questions.question: Select the most appropriate option to fill in the blank. Keats and Shelly were poets of the same period; in other words, they were ___________.
questions.explanation: A)'Contemporaries' का प्रयोग होगा क्योंकि "contemporaries" का अर्थ होता है एक ही समय काल में जीवन बिताने वाले लोग। Keats और Shelly एक ही समय काल के कवि थे, इसलिए यह शब्द उपयुक्त है। 'Co-writers' का अर्थ है सह-लेखक, 'Colleagues' का अर्थ है सहकर्मी, और 'Associates' का अर्थ है सहयोगी, जो इस संदर्भ में सही नहीं है।

questions.question: Select the most appropriate ANTONYM of the underlined word. His recent promotion caused his colleagues to be envious of his newfound success.
questions.explanation: C) admiring- प्रशंसायुक्त

questions.question: The following sentence has been split into four segments. Identify the segment that contains a grammatical error. If you don’t find any error, mark ‘No error’ as your answer. He missed the college bus / because he woke up / unpardonably lately in the morning
questions.explanation: C) 'lately' के स्थान पर'late'का use होगा क्योंकि 'lately' का अर्थ "हाल ही में" होता है, जबकि यहां संदर्भ "देर से" उठने का है। सही शब्द 'late' है। जैसे— "He woke up late in the morning and missed the bus." 'late'will be used instead of 'lately' because 'lately' means "recently," which does not fit the context. The correct adverb is 'late,' which indicates "not on time." Like— "He woke up late in the morning and missed the bus."

questions.question: Select the correctly spelt word.
questions.explanation: C)The correct spelling is'Februaryफरवरी

questions.question: Select the best express Synonym of the given italicize word. Some ancient civilizations predate recorded history by thousands of years.
questions.explanation: A) Predate(verb) – come before, precede, happen earlier, anticipate, exist before पहले का होना Synonym: Precede(verb) – Come before, lead (पूर्ववर्ती होना) Follow(verb) – Succeed, come after (पीछे आना) Coexist(verb) – Exist together, occur simultaneously (सह-अस्तित्व) Overlap(verb) – Coincide, intersect (अधिव्यापन)

questions.question: Select the wrongly spelt word.
questions.explanation: D)The wrongly spelled word in the given options is option D. "Nineteenth". The correct spelling is "Nineteenth"उन्निसवां,सत्रहवां के बाद आने वाला।

questions.question: Select the most appropriate option to fill in the blank. She could easily eat the _________ biryani by herself.
questions.explanation: B) 'Whole' का प्रयोग होगा क्योंकि "whole" का अर्थ होता है पूराया सम्पूर्ण। जबकि 'Haul' का अर्थ है ढोना या खींचना, 'Hall' का अर्थ है एक बड़ा कम राया भवन, और 'Hole' का अर्थ है छेद, जो इस संदर्भ में सही नहीं है।

questions.question: Select the best express Synonym of the given italicize word. The avenue for innovation is wide open with endless opportunities in the tech sector.
questions.explanation: C) Avenue(noun) – path, channel, route, way, opportunity रास्ता / अवसर Synonym:Channel(noun) – Route, path for communication. मार्ग End(noun) – Conclusion, termination. अंत Obstruction(noun) – Barrier, block. रुकावट Blockage(noun) – Hindrance, obstruction. अवरोध

questions.question: Select the option that can be used as a one-word substitute for the given group of words. Burial ground consisting of graves.
questions.explanation: B)Cemetery(noun) – A burial ground consisting of graves. क़ब्रिस्तान

questions.question: Select the most appropriate ANTONYM of the underlined word. The mother patiently waited for her child to finish speaking before offering her opinion.
questions.explanation: A) ImpetuouslyA)Impetuously(adverb) – Impulsively, rashly, hastily, unthinkingly, recklesslyतेजी सेB) Cordially(adverb) – Warmly, sincerely, genially, graciously, affablyसौहार्दपूर्ण ढंग सेC) Diligently(adverb) – Carefully, attentively, conscientiously, meticulously, assiduouslyध्यान सेD)Punctually(adverb) – Promptly, on time, timely, exactly, punctiliouslyसमय पर

questions.question: Select the best express Synonym of the given italicize word. The child tried to imitate the way his older brother played the guitar, hoping to master it just as well.
questions.explanation: D) Imitate(verb) – copy, mimic, emulate, replicate, mirror नकल करना Synonym: Copy(verb) – To reproduce something (नकल करना) Innovate(verb) – To create something new (नवाचार करना) Create(verb) – To bring something into existence (बनाना) Invent(verb) – To make something for the first time (आविष्कार करना)

questions.question: In essence (phrase)
questions.explanation: In essence (phrase) - essentially, basically, fundamentally, संक्षेप में कहें तो

questions.question: Improve the underlined part of the sentence. Choose 'No improvement' as an answer if the sentence is grammatically correct. Watch your step- the third stair have a broken tread.
questions.explanation: C) 'have a broken'के बदले'has a broken'का प्रयोग होगा क्योंकि 'stair' singular है, इसलिए सही verb form 'has' होगा; जैसे— The chair has a broken leg.

questions.question: Select the most appropriate meaning of we bracketed idiom in we given sentence. After repeated failures and disappointment he was tempted (to throw up the sponge) but continued perseverance finally brought success.
options: To surrender or give up the contest
questions.explanation: B)To throw up the sponge(idiom) – To surrender or give up the contestसमर्थन या प्रतियोगिता छोड़ देना.

questions.question: Select the appropriate idiom that can replace the underlined phrase in the following sentence. Despite facing many challenges, Sarah continued to work hard and never gave up.
options: Kept her nose to the grindstone
Biting off more than she could chew
questions.explanation: B) The appropriate idiom to replace the underlined phrase in the sentence is option B, "Kept her nose to the grindstone."

questions.question: Select the most appropriate option to substitute the underlined segment in the given sentence. If no substitution is required, select ‘No substitution’. The teacher asked the students for fill the form before entering the classroom
options: the students to filled the form
the students for filled the form
the students to fill the form
questions.explanation: D) 'for fill'के बदले 'to fill' का प्रयोग होगा क्योंकि 'asked' के बाद हमें infinitive का प्रयोग करना चाहिए; जैसे— The teacher asked the students to study. 'to fill' will be used instead of 'for fill' because after 'asked' we should use the infinitive; Like— The teacher asked the students to study.

questions.question: Parts of the following sentence have been given as options. Select the option that contains an error. This is one of best movies I have ever seen.
questions.explanation: C) one of best में error है। सही phrase "one of the best" होगा, क्योंकि जब किसी विशेष समूह में से किसी एक वस्तु की बात की जाती है, तो "the" का use करना आवश्यक होता है। The error is inoption C. The correct phrase should be"one of the best"because when referring to a singular item as part of a larger group, the article"the"is used to indicate specificity.

questions.question: Parts of a sentence are given below in jumbled order. Arrange the parts in the correct order to form a meaningful sentence. (a) false news websites (b) spreading propaganda about politics (c) thrive because the advertisements and politicians (d) and social networking sites (e) make a lot of money
questions.explanation: D)adcbe false news websites and social networking sites thrive because the advertisements and politicians spreading propaganda about politics make a lot of money (a) false news websites is the subject of the sentence. This tells us who or what the sentence is about, so it should start the sentence. (d) and social networking sites further adds to the subject and logically follows after part (a), continuing the idea that both false news websites and social networking sites are involved. (c) thrive because the advertisements and politicians introduces the verb "thrive" and provides a reason for why these websites and sites thrive, forming the subject-verb relationship: "False news websites and social networking sites thrive." (b) spreading propaganda about politics adds detail by explaining how these entities thrive—by spreading propaganda, clarifying the purpose. (e) make a lot of money gives the outcome of this process, showing that they benefit financially, thus concluding the sentence.

questions.question: Comprehension: In the following passage, some words have been deleted. Read the passage carefully and select the most appropriate option to fill in each blank. A weed is an untamed plant that (1)______ where it is not wanted, usually among gardens or crops. The majority of weeds are (2)________. While some are toxic to horses and cattle, others harm mature crops by (3)________them of water, sunlight, soil and minerals. There are various ways that weeds (4)______. They are (5)_______ transported from one location to another as trash, dust or fodder. Select the most appropriate option to fill in blank number 1.
questions.explanation: A) ‘Spreads'का use होगा क्योंकि इसका अर्थ होता है फैलना। यहाँ context यह है कि "a weed" यानी एक खरपतवार ऐसी जगह फैलता है जहां उसकी आवश्यकता नहीं होती। यह sentence इस बात को स्पष्ट करता है कि खरपतवार बगीचों या फसलों के बीच फैलता है, इसलिए 'spreads' यहाँ सही उत्तर है। जबकि 'amends' का अर्थ है सुधार करना, जो इस संदर्भ में उपयुक्त नहीं है। 'Perfects' का अर्थ है किसी चीज को पूर्णता प्रदान करना, जो संदर्भ से मेल नहीं खाता। 'Evolves' का अर्थ है विकास करना, जो इस context में सही नहीं है क्योंकि यहाँ फैलेने की प्रक्रिया की बात हो रही है। Spreads'will be used because it means to expand or extend. The sentence describes that a weed grows or extends in areas where it is not wanted, making 'spreads' the most fitting option. 'Amends' means to correct or improve, which doesn't align with the context. 'Perfects' refers to making something flawless, which is not relevant here. 'Evolves' implies development or gradual change, which doesn't suit the idea of an untamed plant growing in unwanted areas.

questions.question: Comprehension: In the following passage, some words have been deleted. Read the passage carefully and select the most appropriate option to fill in each blank. A weed is an untamed plant that (1)______ where it is not wanted, usually among gardens or crops. The majority of weeds are (2)________. While some are toxic to horses and cattle, others harm mature crops by (3)________them of water, sunlight, soil and minerals. There are various ways that weeds (4)______. They are (5)_______ transported from one location to another as trash, dust or fodder. Select the most appropriate option to fill in blank number 2.
questions.explanation: D) ‘Dangerous'का use होगा क्योंकि "dangerous" का अर्थ होता है खतरनाक, और वाक्य में बताया गया है कि अधिकतर खरपतवार खतरनाक होते हैं। यह संदर्भ "toxic to horses and cattle" और "harm mature crops" के साथ मेल खाता है। जबकि 'Grace' का अर्थ है सुंदरता, 'Delicates' का अर्थ है नाजुक वस्तुएं, और 'Vices' का अर्थ है बुराइयां, जो इस संदर्भ में सही नहीं हैं। Dangerous'will be used because it means harmful or risky. The sentence mentions that most weeds are harmful, aligning with the context of being "toxic to horses and cattle" and "harm mature crops." Whereas, 'Grace' means elegance, 'Delicates' refers to fragile things, and 'Vices' means immoral or wicked behaviors, none of which fit this context.

questions.question: Comprehension: In the following passage, some words have been deleted. Read the passage carefully and select the most appropriate option to fill in each blank. A weed is an untamed plant that (1)______ where it is not wanted, usually among gardens or crops. The majority of weeds are (2)________. While some are toxic to horses and cattle, others harm mature crops by (3)________them of water, sunlight, soil and minerals. There are various ways that weeds (4)______. They are (5)_______ transported from one location to another as trash, dust or fodder. Select the most appropriate option to fill in blank number 3.
questions.explanation: D)'Depriving'का use होगा क्योंकि "depriving" का अर्थ है किसी चीज़ को वंचित करना या छीन लेना। sentence में यह mention है कि खरपतवार (weeds) फसलों को पानी, धूप, मिट्टी और खनिजों से वंचित कर देते हैं, इसलिए 'depriving' यहाँ सही है। जबकि 'spoiling' का अर्थ है खराब करना, 'relieving' का अर्थ है राहत देना, और 'digesting' का अर्थ है पचाना, जो इस संदर्भ में उपयुक्त नहीं हैं। 'Depriving'will be used because it means to take something away or deny it. The sentence mentions that weeds harm crops by taking away water, sunlight, soil, and minerals, making 'depriving' the most fitting choice. Whereas, 'spoiling' means to damage, 'relieving' means to provide relief, and 'digesting' means to break down food, none of which fit in this context.

questions.question: Comprehension: In the following passage, some words have been deleted. Read the passage carefully and select the most appropriate option to fill in each blank. A weed is an untamed plant that (1)______ where it is not wanted, usually among gardens or crops. The majority of weeds are (2)________. While some are toxic to horses and cattle, others harm mature crops by (3)________them of water, sunlight, soil and minerals. There are various ways that weeds (4)______. They are (5)_______ transported from one location to another as trash, dust or fodder. Select the most appropriate option to fill in blank number 4.
questions.explanation: B) ‘Propagate'का use होगा क्योंकि इसका अर्थ है किसी चीज़ को फैलाना या विस्तार करना। यह sentence में weeds के फैलने के तरीकों को describe कर रहा है, इसलिए 'propagate' यहाँ सही है। जबकि 'entertain' का अर्थ है मनोरंजन करना, 'extension' का अर्थ है विस्तार या जोड़, और 'breach' का अर्थ है उल्लंघन, जो इस context में उपयुक्त नहीं हैं। 'Propagate'will be used because it means to spread or extend something. The sentence is describing the ways weeds spread, making 'propagate' the appropriate choice. Whereas, 'entertain' means to amuse, 'extension' means addition or stretch, and 'breach' means violation, which do not fit in this context.

questions.question: Comprehension: In the following passage, some words have been deleted. Read the passage carefully and select the most appropriate option to fill in each blank. A weed is an untamed plant that (1)______ where it is not wanted, usually among gardens or crops. The majority of weeds are (2)________. While some are toxic to horses and cattle, others harm mature crops by (3)________them of water, sunlight, soil and minerals. There are various ways that weeds (4)______. They are (5)_______ transported from one location to another as trash, dust or fodder. Select the most appropriate option to fill in blank number 5.
questions.explanation: C)'Frequently'का use होगा क्योंकि इसका अर्थ है "अक्सर" या "नियमित अंतराल पर होना।" sentence में यह mention है कि खरपतवार कचरे, धूल या चारे के रूप में एक स्थान से दूसरे स्थान पर स्थानांतरित किए जाते हैं, जो नियमितता को दर्शाता है। इसलिए, 'frequently' यहाँ सही है। जबकि 'Every' का अर्थ है "प्रत्येक," जो इस संदर्भ में उपयुक्त नहीं है। 'Rare' का अर्थ है "दुर्लभ," जो वाक्य के भाव के विपरीत है। 'Consequence' का अर्थ है "परिणाम," जो किसी प्रक्रिया का फल है और यहाँ फिट नहीं होता। Frequently'will be used because it means "happening often" or "at regular intervals." The sentence mentions that weeds are transported from one place to another as trash, dust, or fodder, implying regularity, making 'frequently' the correct choice. Whereas, 'Every' means "each" and is not suitable here. 'Rare' means "uncommon," which contradicts the context. 'Consequence' means "result," which doesn't fit in this scenario.
